---
name: Logic request
about: Suggest that a certain logic be implemented
title: 'Request to add (logic name)'
labels: logic-request
assignees: jonathandung
---

## Abstract

Describe the logic and summarize its potential use cases.

## Use cases

- Expand on each mentioned use case in a list.

## Theoretical implementation

How this would probably be implemented.

It would be best to include the bodies of the `__and__`, `__or__` and `__invert__` methods, and also possibly `from_normalized` (must come with
`normalize`), beside the selling points of the logic type.

Pseudocode is fine in this early stage.

## Links

- Link to at least two online sources talking about this logic, including possibly research papers, books and websites.
- Do not link original or unpublished research.
- Delete this section if the logic is novel.
